channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Texas attorney general files lawsuit against homeless navigation center in Austin
item.description: The OAG said it did an investigation which found the center to be a "magnet" for drug and criminal activity.
item.dc:creator: Brianna Hollis, NewsNation

item.title: Docs: Ex-Avon choir teacher filmed sexual videos in his classroom, sent them to girls on Snapchat
item.description: AVON, Ind. — A former choir and theater teacher in the Avon school system faces felony charges after allegedly filming himself masturbating in his classroom and sending the videos to teen girls. Kayvon H.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, NewsNation

item.title: Judge finds New York City in contempt over jail conditions, moves closer to a federal takeover
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A judge on Wednesday found New York City in contempt for failing to staunch violence and brutality at its jails, a scathing ruling that puts the troubled Rikers Island jail complex on the verge of a federal takeover. In a written decision, U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, MICHAEL R. SISAK and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Disney agrees to $43 million settlement in gender pay lawsuit
item.description: The agreement settles allegations initially made in a 2019 lawsuit filed by Disney employee LaRonda Rasmussen, who claimed she was getting paid less than her male counterparts in the same role.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WGN 9

item.title: PHOTOS: More than $18M in fake Gibson guitars seized by U.S. Customs and Border Protection
item.description: U.S. Customs and Border Protection seized more than 3,000 fake Gibson guitars worth nearly $19 million, had they been genuine.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump nominees targeted in series of threats, spokesperson says
item.description: (The Hill) - Multiple nominees and appointees tapped to serve in President-elect Trump’s incoming administration were targeted with threats this week, a spokesperson for the transition said Wednesday, though it was unclear how many were affected.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Kouri Richins sought fentanyl from multiple sources, new evidence claims
item.description: Prosecutors have claimed Kouri Richins obtained fentanyl from an acquaintance later identified as her housekeeper.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, NewsNation

item.title: Biden team briefed Trump transition on Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire
item.description: President-elect Trump's transition team has received briefings from the chief architect of the Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire deal under President Biden, a senior administration official said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: WATCH: Texas builds border wall at ranch it wants to gift Trump for deportations
item.description: STARR COUNTY, Texas (Border Report) -- Under gray skies with patriotic music blaring in the background, construction crews on Tuesday put up a border wall on land the state recently bought and offered to the incoming Trump administration to use for deportation facilities.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation

item.title: China releases 3 Americans in prisoner swap
item.description: Mark Swidan, Kai Li and John Leung were freed after years of talks between U.S. and Chinese officials.
item.dc:creator: Katie Smith, NewsNation

item.title: 3 Americans held for years in China have been released, White House says
item.description: Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China have been released and are returning to the United States, the White House said Wednesday, announcing a rare diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California coastal enclave near sanctuary city tries to 'Newsom-proof' itself
item.description: A California mayor criticized state lawmakers for the sanctuary city policies he alleges have exacerbated illegal immigration into the state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Some of those Ocean Spray cranberries come from a bog in Massachusetts
item.description: Weeks before Thanksgiving, some of the cranberries that will be on dinner plates Thursday were floating on a bog in Massachusetts.
item.dc:creator: Michael Casey, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump taps Kevin Hassett as National Economic Council head
item.description: President-elect Trump has chosen former White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett to lead the National Economic Council in his next administration, he said Tuesday. “I am very pleased to announce that Dr. Kevin A.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: World's oldest man has died in England at 112
item.description: John Alfred Tinniswood was born a few months after the sinking of the Titanic and lived through two world wars.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How Trump's bet on voters electing him managed to silence some of his legal woes
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — One year after the Jan. 6, 2021, U.S. Capitol attack, Attorney General Merrick Garland said the Justice Department was committed to holding accountable all perpetrators “at any level” for “the assault on our democracy.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's threat to impose tariffs could raise prices for consumers, colliding with promise for relief
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — If Donald Trump makes good on his threat to slap 25% tariffs on everything imported from Mexico and Canada, the price increases that could follow will collide with his campaign promise to give American families a break from inflation.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER and CHRISTOPHER RUGABER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: San Francisco watchdog Ricci Wynne arrested, suspected of pimping
item.description: Wynne has legions of social media followers. Over the past three years, videos posted on his social media pages, RawRicci415, garnered hundreds of thousands of views.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tim Walz accepts turkey presentation as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — As feathers flew, Tim Walz accepted the symbolic presentation of a turkey Tuesday as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor following the Harris-Walz ticket's defeat in the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Dog treats distributed to Florida recalled for potential salmonella
item.description: A chicken-based dog treat sold online and in stores across 19 states has been recalled over the potential risk of salmonella.
item.dc:creator: Carlos Mathis, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dog treats distributed to 19 states recalled for potential salmonella
item.description: A chicken-based dog treat sold online and in stores across 19 states has been recalled over the potential risk of salmonella.
item.dc:creator: Carlos Mathis, KRON4

item.title: Trump's 'border czar' pick says he's willing to put Denver mayor 'in jail' over deportation position
item.description: "But, look, me and the Denver mayor, we agree on one thing. He’s willing to go to jail, I’m willing to put him in jail.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, Fox 5

item.title: Tank explodes, catches fire near GM facility in Michigan
item.description: A tank containing byproducts from oil drilling operations exploded and caught fire Tuesday near the General Motors Proving Ground in southeastern Michigan, damaging two nearby homes but causing no injuries, a fire chief said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: HIV-positive organ transplants allowed under new rule
item.description: People with HIV will soon be permitted to receive transplanted kidneys and livers from donors who are also infected with the virus under a new rule approved by the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Israel, Lebanon's Hezbollah agree to a ceasefire to end nearly 14 months of fighting
item.description: Israel approved a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah on Tuesday, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Elton John reveals that he has lost sight in one eye
item.description: Music legend Elton John says an infection he got earlier this year has left him without sight in one eye. The "Rocket Man" singer revealed in September that a severe eye infection had left him with "only limited vision in one eye.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KTLA 5

item.title: Repealing no-fault divorce has so far stalled across the US. Some worry that'll change under Trump
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Married couples across the U.S. have had access to no-fault divorce for more than 50 years, an option many call crucial to supporting domestic abuse victims and key to preventing already crowded family courts from drowning in complicated divorce proceedings.
item.dc:creator: KIMBERLEE KRUESI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Here's where Trump's criminal cases stand
item.description: President-elect Trump’s legal strategy of delay is paying off, with his election victory changing the trajectory of his four criminal prosecutions.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WGN 9

item.title: Walmart becomes largest company to roll back diversity, equity and inclusion policies
item.description: Walmart, the world’s largest retailer, is rolling back its diversity, equity and inclusion policies, joining a growing list of major corporations that have done the same after coming under attack by conservative activists.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump's favorability climbs in post-election poll
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s favorability climbed by six points after he was elected president earlier this month, a new poll on Tuesday found.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, ABC 4

item.title: Biden proposes Medicare, Medicaid cover costly weight-loss drugs like like Wegovy or Ozempic
item.description: A bipartisan coalition of congressional members have lobbied for the drugs to be covered by Medicare, saying it could save the government from spending billions of dollars on treating chronic ailments that stem from obesity.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: What Black Friday's history tells us about holiday shopping in 2024
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The holiday shopping season is about to reach full speed with Black Friday, which kicks off the post-Thanksgiving retail rush later this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump threatens to impose sweeping tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China on first day
item.description: The tariffs, if implemented, could dramatically raise prices for American consumers on everything from gas to automobiles to agricultural products.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Auto industry's shift toward EVs is expected to go on despite Trump threat to kill tax credits
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — If President-elect Donald Trump makes good on his threat to kill federal tax credits for electric vehicle purchases, it’s likely that fewer buyers will choose EVs.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER AP Auto Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Judge rejects request to sideline a San Jose State volleyball player on grounds she’s transgender
item.description: A judge on Monday rejected a request to block a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member from playing in a conference tournament on grounds that she is transgender. The ruling by U.S. Magistrate Judge S.
item.dc:creator: MEAD GRUVER and AMY BETH HANSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump threatens sweeping new tariffs on Mexico, Canada & China on 1st day in office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is threatening to impose sweeping new tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China as soon as he takes office as part of his efforts to crack down on illegal immigration and drugs.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 20 cars stranded in Oregon snow after faulty GPS directions
item.description: Usually, when you turn to a GPS, you're trying not to get stranded. More than a dozen drivers in Oregon weren't so lucky last week.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Deml, ABC 4
